subject: Rehearsal dinner logistics - Karim's side
body_preview: Hi Maria - Karim asked me to loop you in as maid of honor. For the rehearsal dinner at Lakeside Kitchen on March 12, we are bringing 14 from Karim's side (parents, siblings, uncles Youssef and Omar, Sami Farouk plus wife Layla, cousins Nour and Rania and Tarek). Two guests need halal, one is gluten-free. Let me know if the private room fits our count with the Sandoval side.

subject: Re: Rehearsal dinner logistics - Karim's side
body_preview: Amina - thanks for the roster. 14 fits with our count; Lakeside private room seats 40 and we are at 32 combined for the rehearsal dinner. Halal and gluten-free are on the catering sheet. Sending the final seating chart on Monday. - Maria

subject: Karim's parents - hotel and airport pickup
body_preview: Maria - Karim's parents land at DTW on March 11 at 6:20 PM. We booked the Dearborn Inn for three nights. Would you or Jason be able to meet them at baggage claim? Karim will be in a procedure until 8 PM that evening.

subject: Re: Karim's parents - hotel and airport pickup
body_preview: Yes - I will meet them. Jason lands earlier that same evening at 8:47 PM per his Amadeus reservation, so he can handoff at the Dearborn Inn if I need to sub back to the studio. I will confirm my Uber block with the Wednesday materials packet drop for Rachel.

subject: Rehearsal dinner seating - final combined chart
body_preview: Confirming the seating: Table 1 wedding party (8), Table 2 immediate Sandoval family (6, with Mom and Dad away from the corner where Mark's brother sits), Table 3 Haddad parents and siblings (6), Table 4 Sandoval extended (6), Table 5 Haddad extended and Sami Farouk (6). Any changes, tell me tonight.
